description: Lock corrected early pottery, masonry, reed-architecture, and contextual-edge chronology.

checks.reason: Pottery is anchored to Xianrendong evidence around 20,000 years ago.
Clay preparation is kept as a dependency lower bound for the early pottery node.
Masonry is scoped to durable stone construction anchored by Gobekli Tepe.
Reed mat architecture is scoped to the southern Mesopotamian reed-building tradition.
Masonry is an application context for moving stones, not a prerequisite for levers and rollers.
Fired bricks are clay-firing technology, not a direct case of stone masonry.
Masonry is an application surface for plaster, not a prerequisite for lime plaster chemistry.
Generic windbreak shelters should not require a later regional reed-building tradition.
Basketry granaries depend on storage/weaving context rather than reed architecture.
